selections.name: Five Wishes
selections.reason: Benefits significantly from the outside flow bias and avoids the dead rail. Strong 101 base speed figure.

selections.name: Southeastern
selections.reason: Solid 100 speed figure and draws well outside the compromised inner posts.

selections.name: Special Ops
selections.reason: Highest raw speed (103) but takes a slight penalty due to the severe inside rail disadvantage.

selections.name: Felonious
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 102 speed figure, but must overcome the dead rail from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Life Is Gravy (ire)
danger_horse.reason: Classy runner (112 class rating) who could factor if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Romantic Dancer
selections.reason: Boasts a field-high 112 class rating and projects a clean stalking trip from the outside post.

selections.name: Agia Marina
selections.reason: Tied for the highest speed figure (111) and should save ground on the sweeping turns.

selections.name: Trail Of Gold
selections.reason: Matches the top speed figure of 111 and offers excellent value at 8/1.

selections.name: Can't Fool Me
selections.reason: Strong 110 speed figure and 105 class rating makes her a major exotic contender.

danger_horse.name: Kiamba (ire)
danger_horse.reason: Heavy morning line favorite (1/2) with a 110 class rating, but speed figures are slightly lower than top picks.

selections.name: Opulent Restraint (ire)
selections.reason: Massive speed and class advantage (117/117). The clear standout in this field.

selections.name: Peak Hype
selections.reason: Strong 113 speed figure and draws well to stalk the pace.

selections.name: Silvology
selections.reason: Matches Peak Hype's 113 speed figure and should get a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Growth Trajectory (gb)
selections.reason: Solid 110 speed figure and 107 class rating; dangerous from the rail.

danger_horse.name: Unreasonable (ire)
danger_horse.reason: Classy European import who could improve second time stateside.

selections.name: K Gun
selections.reason: Huge class advantage (115) and perfectly drawn outside to capitalize on the track bias.

selections.name: Big Air
selections.reason: Highest raw speed figure (103) and gets the ultimate outside draw for the preferred flow.

selections.name: Princess Ny
selections.reason: Consistent 101 speed figure and draws well enough to avoid the dead rail.

selections.name: Howling Wind
selections.reason: Strong 106 class rating, but takes a penalty for the inside draw in a dirt sprint.

danger_horse.name: Hey Cookie
danger_horse.reason: Capable of 102 speed, but the rail draw is a severe disadvantage today.

selections.name: Key Actress
selections.reason: Tops the field with a 109 speed figure and holds a strong 103 class rating.

selections.name: Dimensionality
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (107) and pairs it with a solid 104 speed figure.

selections.name: Sweet Mackenzie
selections.reason: Competitive 106 speed figure makes her a major threat at 6/1.

selections.name: Pulling Threads
selections.reason: Classy (103) and taking money on the morning line (2/1) despite lower raw speed figures.

danger_horse.name: Beside You
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a 102 speed figure at double-digit odds.

selections.name: Just Peachy
selections.reason: Dominant speed (118) and class (117) figures make her the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Honey Honey
selections.reason: Strong 113 speed and 114 class ratings; the main threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Ghost Me
selections.reason: First-time starter taking respect on the morning line at 3/1.

selections.name: Cadillac Mary
selections.reason: Another well-meant first-time starter at 9/2.

danger_horse.name: Nashoba
danger_horse.reason: Has experience and a 109 speed figure, could clunk up for a piece at a price.

selections.name: Golden Symphony
selections.reason: Top speed (105) and class (101) in the field, perfectly drawn outside for the track bias.

selections.name: Screaming Uncle
selections.reason: Strong 104 speed figure and gets the preferred outside flow.

selections.name: Go Irish
selections.reason: Consistent 104 speed figure and draws well to stalk the pace.

selections.name: Farm Team
selections.reason: Matches the 104 speed figure but draws a bit further inside.

danger_horse.name: Dot's Dollar
danger_horse.reason: Solid 103 speed figure and can factor if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Mr R T
selections.reason: Solid 97 speed and 96 class, draws perfectly to get the outside flow bias.

selections.name: Ghost Army
selections.reason: Morning line favorite at 5/2, gets the outside draw and fits well on figures.

selections.name: Restless Renegade
selections.reason: Highest raw speed (104) but takes a significant penalty for the dead rail draw.

selections.name: Chess Match
selections.reason: Competitive 98 speed figure and should get a good stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Dare Defying
danger_horse.reason: Taking money at 5/1 and has a respectable 95 speed figure.

selections.name: Voodoo Doll
selections.reason: Massive 120 class rating and 112 speed figure makes this runner the class of the field.

selections.name: Capital Partner (gb)
selections.reason: Strong 113 class rating and 111 speed figure; the logical main danger.

selections.name: Tiz Trouble
selections.reason: Boasts a 118 class rating and a solid 106 speed figure.

selections.name: Gulfy
selections.reason: Morning line favorite (8/5) with a 104 speed figure, but others offer better value on top.

danger_horse.name: Woods
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a 112 speed figure on his best day.

selections.name: He's My Kind
selections.reason: Towering 122 speed figure makes him a standout in this turf sprint.

selections.name: Jubilee Parade
selections.reason: Excellent 117 speed and 113 class ratings; the clear second choice.

selections.name: No Compromise
selections.reason: High 115 class rating and a solid 108 speed figure.

selections.name: Gordy
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 103 speed figure and 105 class rating.

danger_horse.name: Big Destroyer
danger_horse.reason: Taking money at 7/2 despite lacking established figures.
